icp.min_seniority: Manager or above (Director, Head, VP, C-level preferred)

product.name: Alfaleus Vision Diagnostics Platform
product.description: AI-powered eye-care diagnostic technology that makes early detection of vision disorders accessible and affordable for hospitals and clinics.
product.value_proposition: Helps eye-care providers screen more patients faster with portable, AI-assisted diagnostics — expanding reach while reducing cost per screening.
